trade.summary: The Paesi Bassi is the Regno Unito's second-largest export destination and among its most important trading partners. Rotterdam is the primary entry point for Regno Unito goods into the EU. Regno Unito exports financial services, chemicals, and agri-food to the Paesi Bassi. The Paesi Bassi re-exports and ships vast quantities of goods to the Regno Unito. Post-Brexit, Dutch ports became crucial EU-Regno Unito trade intermediaries.
disputes: post-Brexit customs friction at Rotterdam-Felixstowe corridor

diplomatic.summary: The Regno Unito and the Paesi Bassi have exceptionally close ties — shared monarchy history (House of Orange), financial links (Shell, Unilever Anglo-Dutch mergers), and aligned foreign policy. The Paesi Bassi has been among the more pragmatic EU members on post-Brexit Regno Unito relations. Both countries closely aligned on NATO, Ucraina, and Russia sanctions. The Hague hosts the ICC, relevant to various Regno Unito international law positions.
recent_incidents: Ajax-Tottenham fan violence in Amsterdam (2024) — brief diplomatic moment

military.summary: Both NATO allies with deep military cooperation. Regno Unito-Paesi Bassi Amphibious Force is a combined military unit. Close intelligence sharing (Paesi Bassi AIVD works closely with MI6/GCHQ). Joint naval patrols and North Sea operations. Both countries strongly aligned on NATO's eastern flank and Ucraina support.

financial.summary: Extraordinarily deep financial ties. Shell (historically Anglo-Dutch, now Regno Unito-headquartered) and Unilever represent the depth of bilateral corporate integration. Amsterdam became the largest European equity trading venue post-Brexit (overtaking London for EU shares). Significant Dutch institutional investment in Regno Unito gilts and equities. ASML's chip lithography monopoly is of strategic interest to Regno Unito tech policy.

energy.summary: North Sea energy cooperation through joint gas fields and pipeline infrastructure. Paesi Bassi was historically a major gas exporter to Regno Unito through Bacton-Zeebrugge interconnector. Both are transitioning away from fossil fuels. Cooperation in offshore wind and hydrogen corridors.

scientific.summary: Very strong research ties. Major Dutch universities (Leiden, Amsterdam, Delft) have deep Regno Unito institutional links. CERN, ESA participation overlaps. Life sciences corridor (Oxford-Cambridge-Amsterdam-Leiden) is a global hub. Regno Unito retained Horizon Europe access restoring joint research funding.
